disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain began as a vague ache near the navel yesterday and has since shifted and localised to the lower right abdomen
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain and has it moved?
Can you talk me through how the pain started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started as a dull ache around my belly button yesterday, but over the last several hours it's moved and settled as a sharp pain low down on the right.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete loss of appetite since the pain began
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to eat anything?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've completely gone off my food since this started — I couldn't face eating anything.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: One episode of nausea and vomiting that came on after the pain, not before it
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt sick or been sick?
Did the vomiting come before or after the pain started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I felt sick and threw up once this afternoon — but that was after the pain had already been going for a while, not before.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain is markedly worse with movement, coughing and being jolted (e.g. the car ride)
trigger_question_examples: Does anything make the pain worse — moving, coughing, going over bumps?
Is it worse when you move around?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — moving at all, coughing, and the bumpy car ride home earlier all made it much worse. It's easiest if I stay completely still with my knees bent up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Subjective feeling of fever since the morning
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt hot or feverish?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've felt hot and a bit feverish since this morning, though I haven't taken my temperature.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent pregnancy test at a clinic was negative
trigger_question_examples: Is there any chance you could be pregnant?
When was your last period, and have you had a recent pregnancy test?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's no chance I'm pregnant — I had a pregnancy test at a clinic recently and it was negative.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No burning, frequency or urgency passing urine
trigger_question_examples: Any burning or stinging when you pass urine?
Are you needing to pass urine more often than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing like that — no burning or stinging, and I'm not going more often than normal.
